'''âj-ng-y-sh''' ('''kajangyeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tiara|tiara]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tiara|tiara]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-ng-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kajangyeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijangyeshoko|thijangyeshoko]] || [[word:jijangyeshoko|jijangyeshoko]] || [[word:shijangyeshoko|shijangyeshoko]] || [[word:kijangyeshoko|kijangyeshoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
